user.title: Connect to a Socrata dataset
user.description: Enter a Socrata portal and dataset identifier. This early vertical slice retrieves the newest row using the selected timestamp field.

data_description.portal_url: Base portal URL, for example https://data.example.gov.
data_description.timestamp_field: Field used to order rows newest-first. The default uses Socrata's system update timestamp.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Socrata portal.
error.invalid_input: The portal URL or dataset settings are invalid.
error.invalid_response: The portal returned an invalid or unsupported response.

abort.already_configured: This Socrata dataset is already configured.
